examples: By sucking sap from the young twigs of the hemlock tree, tree growth is retarded by the woolly adelgid, causing needles to change color from deep green to grayish green and to drop prematurely.
And a pond edged with grayish leaves.
A cushion-cut fancy deep grayish blue diamond weighing 35.56 carats.
But down a hall, in a grayish-beige cubicle farm, it feels like a ghost office.
He has a weathered face, grayish-brown eyes, and legs that seem to take up three-quarters of his body.
